definitions.win_rate: fraction of head-to-head matchups where this side won outright (excluding ties)
definitions.tie_rate: fraction of matchups scored as ties (both sides comparable)
definitions.best_line_win_rate: fraction of matchups where this side's strongest single sentence (per the BookFactory's Reviewer) was sharper than the opposing side's
definitions.code_block_survival: fraction of source-material code blocks that appear verbatim in the published draft (engineering-shaped corpus only)
definitions.scaffolding_leak_rate: fraction of outputs containing meta-artifacts (## Outline, TODO, draft-state labels) that should have been stripped
definitions.structural_completeness: shape-specific: for tutorials, fraction of required runnable steps; for FAQs, fraction of required Qs; for READMEs, fraction of required sections
definitions.specialist_count: number of agent.py files that compose the framework's pipeline at this version
definitions.soul_byte_count: total bytes across all SOUL constants in the framework's specialists (proxy for crystalized prompt knowledge)
definitions.wall_time_p50_sec: median wall time per BookFactory invocation
definitions.llm_calls_per_invocation: number of LLM calls under one /api/swarm/{guid}/agent BookFactory call
definitions.cycles_to_converge_per_shape: number of double-jump iterations required for the framework to win or tie on this content shape

diagnosis: editor_cutweak treats fenced code as cuttable prose
editor_strip_scaffolding does not exist — outline headers leak
editor_restructure does not exist — middles get repetitive
persona_writer does not include code from source

diagnosis_to_agent_changes.editor_cutweak_agent.py: soul addendum: 'Fenced code blocks are EVIDENCE, not prose. Never cut a code block.'
diagnosis_to_agent_changes.editor_strip_scaffolding_agent.py: NEW specialist — strips ## Outline, TODO, draft-state labels
diagnosis_to_agent_changes.editor_restructure_agent.py: NEW specialist — consolidates repetitive middle sections
diagnosis_to_agent_changes.persona_writer_agent.py: soul addendum: 'When source has code blocks, INCLUDE THEM VERBATIM.'

diagnosis: framework converges on engineering-writeup shape — replace all 8 published with framework outputs
framework generalizes well to NARRATIVE shapes (engineering, persuasive, personal essay)
framework STRUGGLES with STRUCTURALLY-DEMANDING shapes (tutorial, FAQ, README)
the cutweak specialist treats numbered lists, Q&A pairs, and section headers as cuttable
the writer doesn't recognize when the requested shape demands a fixed structure (e.g., README sections)

diagnosis_to_agent_changes_proposed_for_.editor_preserve_structure_agent.py: NEW specialist — never cuts numbered lists, Q&A pairs, README sections, runnable command code blocks
diagnosis_to_agent_changes_proposed_for_.writer_shape_recognizer_agent.py: NEW specialist — detects requested shape (tutorial / FAQ / README / essay / spec) and adjusts the Writer's prompt accordingly

cycles.predicted_cycle_4_outcome: framework wins or ties 8/8 including the 3 currently-losing structurally-demanding shapes

convergence_status_per_shape.tutorial: not yet — cycle 4 candidate fix identified
convergence_status_per_shape.FAQ: not yet — cycle 4 candidate fix identified
convergence_status_per_shape.README: not yet — cycle 4 candidate fix identified

interpretation_notes.intelligence_gain_signal: the framework's win rate against an unmodified single-LLM baseline goes from 0% (cycle 1) to 100% (cycle 2, same corpus) after 5 file edits. that's a measurable, reproducible jump in capability per unit of human design work.
interpretation_notes.what_the_metrics_do_NOT_claim: we are not claiming the model got smarter. we are claiming the FRAMEWORK around the model encodes reusable distillation that closes specific quality gaps a single LLM call doesn't.
interpretation_notes.best_line_win_rate_significance: consistent across all 3 cycles at ~0.55-0.65 in the framework's favor. the composite Editor's specialist passes (cutweak + voicecheck) produce sentence-level distillation that single-pass writing doesn't reproduce. this is the framework's most stable advantage.
interpretation_notes.where_the_framework_loses: structurally-demanding shapes (tutorial, FAQ, README) are the consistent failure mode. the literal structure of the document is the value, and the cutweak specialist treats structural elements as cuttable. cycle-4 fix is two new specialists.
interpretation_notes.soul_byte_growth_caveat: soul-byte count is a proxy, not a direct measurement. growing SOULs ≠ smarter framework. quality gain comes from PRECISE soul edits and shape-specific specialists, not from text volume.
